headline: AI Leader GE Vernova: Data-Center Customers 'Are Struggling To Get Projects Across The Line'
summary: GE Vernova's CEO noted community pushback on AI data centers, but sees little risk to growth. GE Vernova stock fell but is near a buy point.

headline: GE Vernova Turbine Milestone Raises Questions On Cash Flows And Dividends
summary: GE Vernova’s H class gas turbine fleet has reached 4 million commercial operating hours. The milestone reflects large scale deployment and long term use of its high efficiency gas turbines across 21 countries. The news highlights GE Vernova’s role in supplying flexible gas power capacity as electricity demand evolves worldwide. For investors tracking NYSE:GEV, this operational milestone arrives with the stock trading at $1,070.47 and very large 1 year and year to date returns, at 127.5% and...
